contract.goal: Implement `loom project archive <slug>` — coordinates manifest status update and dir relocation under projects/archive/.
acceptance_criteria: archive.ts exports an archive function that takes a slug and performs both operations
Verb is non-atomic; doctor reports drift if relocate fails after manifest write
Emits archived event via events.append on success
rules_applied: Coordinates manifest + events write atomically via the writer module
disqualifiers: Auto-rolls back manifest on relocate failure
Modifies files outside the named project's directory

corrections: Initial impl auto-rolled back manifest on relocate failure — that violates the non-atomic design decision; reverted.

changes_since_previous: Adds the archive verb logic; doctor integration follows in unit 08.

reasons: relocate test does not verify post-state consistency when fs.rename throws partway
archived event detail is missing the destination path field per LOOM-CONVENTIONS.md event vocabulary

notes_for_pr: Will address both flagged reasons in the next pass.
Doctor verb is the safety net for the non-atomic design — landing in unit 08.
